notes: Can refer to the core of a fruit (e.g. apple core, cherry pit), the nucleus of an atom, or figuratively the core/essence of something.

sentences.german: Der Kern des Apfels ist nicht essbar.
sentences.english: The core of the apple is not edible.

sentences.german: Die Kerne der Kirschen sind sehr hart.
sentences.english: The pits of the cherries are very hard.

sentences.german: Das ist der Kern des Problems.
sentences.english: That is the core of the problem.
